summary: Iteration 13: Complete validation of image upload, SEO automation, AI SEO optimizer, admin back-office SEO Studio parity, sitemap XML, contact Emailit, and admin protection. 30/31 tests passed (1 skipped - SEO auto-sync already executed). All UI tests passed including SEO Studio on both /admin/pages/new and /admin/pages/[id].
critical_code_review_comments: Image upload with ShortPixel optimization works correctly with local Sharp fallback
SEO Studio panel provides comprehensive page-level SEO editing with 100% completion score on existing pages
AI SEO optimizer (Gemini) is REAL - returns schema.org JSON-LD and SEO recommendations
Sitemap XML correctly excludes noindex pages (mentions-legales) and includes changefreq/priority
Page creation triggers async SEO/OG automation (automatePageSeoAndOg)
Contact form uses Emailit (REAL, not mocked) with proper validation
OG images stored at /uploads/og/... and CMS images at /uploads/cms/...
All public routes accessible and rendering CMS content correctly

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All admin and public UI tests passed

seed_data_creation: None - using existing CMS data (10+ published FR pages with SEO automation already applied)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Image upload API at /api/admin/images/upload works with multipart form data. SEO auto-sync at /api/admin/seo/auto-sync already processed 10 FR pages (skipped in this iteration due to long AI wait times). Contact API is at /api/contact/send (not /api/contact). All SEO fields populated on existing pages with 100% completion score.
